creator: freebsd@passwall.com
text:
Similar problem. Built named from source to run in chroot on FreeBSD 14.1

FreeBSD 14.1: 14.1-RELEASE-p6.
Bind: 9.18.31
FreeBSD 14.1
uname -K : 1401000

All pkg updated to latest available from repo Oct 15, 2024 including libuv-1.49 and named would not start.

Tried "make clean" of named after all pkg upgraded (including libuv-1.49), installed named in chroot, and failed to start.

Downgraded pkg libuv to 1.48, and named started in chroot.

Today (Oct 31, 2023) I tested the proposed 1.49.2 (ports build of libuv pkg)
New "make clean" of named after upgrade to libuv-1.49.2 from ports, and then install in chroot and named starts chroot.

WRT "name in chroot" : for me, libuv-1.48 worked, 1.49 did not work, 1.49.2 worked.

HTH
